mapper.select: SELECT sd.shipped_qty - NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN rr.status IN ('REQUESTED', 'APPROVED', 'COMPLETED') THEN rr.return_qty ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS returnable_qty FROM shipment_detail sd LEFT JOIN return_request rr ON rr.shipment_detail_id = sd.shipment_detail_id WHERE sd.shipment_detail_id = #{shipmentDetailId} GROUP BY sd.shipped_qty

SELECT return_id, customer_id, so_id, product_id, inventory_lot_id, return_qty, reason, status, created_by, created_at, shipment_detail_id, approved_by, approved_at, completed_at, reject_reason, return_group_id FROM return_request WHERE return_group_id=#{returnGroupId} ORDER BY return_id
mapper.update: UPDATE RETURN_REQUEST SET status='APPROVED', approved_by=#{approvedBy}, approved_at=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE return_group_id=#{returnGroupId} AND status='REQUESTED'
mapper.select: SELECT sod.so_detail_id, so.so_id, sod.order_qty, sod.unit_price, so.total_amount FROM sales_order so JOIN Sales_order_detail sod ON sod.so_id = so.so_id WHERE so.so_id = #{salesOrderId}

SELECT shd.shipment_detail_id, sod.so_id, sod.so_detail_id, sod.product_id, sod.order_qty, il.lot_no, il.inventory_lot_id, shd.shipped_qty, NVL(SUM(sm.qty), 0) AS out_qty FROM sales_order_detail sod JOIN shipment_detail shd ON shd.so_detail_id = sod.so_detail_id JOIN inventory_lot il ON il.inventory_lot_id = shd.inventory_lot_id LEFT JOIN stock_movement sm ON sm.source_type = 'SHIPMENT_DETAIL' AND sm.source_id = shd.shipment_detail_id AND sm.movement_type = 'OUT' WHERE sod.so_id = #{salesOrderId} GROUP BY shd.shipment_detail_id, sod.so_id, sod.so_detail_id, sod.product_id, sod.order_qty, il.lot_no ,il.inventory_lot_id,shd.shipped_qty
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO return_request (return_id, return_group_id, customer_id, so_id, product_id, inventory_lot_id, return_qty, reason, status, created_by, created_at, shipment_detail_id) SELECT #{returnId}, #{returnGroupId}, so.customer_id, sod.so_id, sod.product_id, shd.inventory_lot_id, #{returnQty}, #{reason}, 'REQUESTED', #{createdBy}, SYSTIMESTAMP, shd.shipment_detail_id FROM sales_order_detail sod JOIN sales_order so ON so.so_id = sod.so_id JOIN shipment_detail shd ON shd.so_detail_id = sod.so_detail_id WHERE sod.so_id = #{salesOrderId} AND sod.so_detail_id = #{soDetailId} AND shd.shipment_detail_id = #{shipmentDetailId}

INSERT INTO stock_movement (movement_id, inventory_lot_id, movement_type, source_type, source_id, before_qty, qty, after_qty, created_by, created_at) SELECT #{stmvSeq}, rr.inventory_lot_id, 'RETURN', 'RETURN_REQUEST', rr.return_id, il.current_qty - rr.return_qty, rr.return_qty, il.current_qty, #{empId}, SYSTIMESTAMP FROM return_request rr JOIN inventory_lot il ON il.inventory_lot_id = rr.inventory_lot_id WHERE rr.return_id = #{returnId}
mapper.select: SELECT rr.return_id, rr.shipment_detail_id, rr.inventory_lot_id, NVL((SELECT SUM(sm.qty) FROM stock_movement sm WHERE sm.movement_type = 'OUT' AND sm.source_type = 'SHIPMENT_DETAIL' AND sm.source_id = rr.shipment_detail_id AND sm.inventory_lot_id = rr.inventory_lot_id), 0) AS out_qty, NVL((SELECT SUM(sm.qty) FROM stock_movement sm JOIN return_request r ON r.return_id = sm.source_id WHERE sm.movement_type = 'RETURN' AND sm.source_type = 'RETURN_REQUEST' AND r.shipment_detail_id = rr.shipment_detail_id AND sm.inventory_lot_id = rr.inventory_lot_id), 0) AS returned_qty FROM return_request rr WHERE rr.return_id = #{returnId}

SELECT NVL(SUM(sod.unit_price * rr.return_qty), 0) AS return_amount FROM return_request rr JOIN shipment_detail shd ON shd.shipment_detail_id = rr.shipment_detail_id JOIN sales_order_detail sod ON sod.so_detail_id = shd.so_detail_id WHERE rr.return_group_id = #{returnGroupId}
mapper.update: UPDATE sales_order SET total_amount = total_amount - (SELECT NVL(SUM(sod.unit_price * rr.return_qty), 0) FROM return_request rr JOIN shipment_detail shd ON shd.shipment_detail_id = rr.shipment_detail_id JOIN sales_order_detail sod ON sod.so_detail_id = shd.so_detail_id WHERE rr.return_group_id = #{returnGroupId}) WHERE so_id = #{salesOrderId} AND total_amount >= (SELECT NVL(SUM(sod.unit_price * rr.return_qty), 0) FROM return_request rr JOIN shipment_detail shd ON shd.shipment_detail_id = rr.shipment_detail_id JOIN sales_order_detail sod ON sod.so_detail_id = shd.so_detail_id WHERE rr.return_group_id = #{returnGroupId})
UPDATE return_request SET status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE return_group_id = #{returnGroupId} AND status = 'APPROVED'
